name: Teaching Her | Takako Uro
description:
W goons? 🤤🤤🤤Here’s one more of my gorgeous beauty Uro

she is very aggressive and dominant so you guys should probably be aware of that for a small little warning. (I like it like that though 😜😜😜)

Genuinely my girl so you guys know I HAD to make her mine 🤤🤤🤤

Arguably one of the more stronger Jjk characters, imo she might be a top 10 (most likely glaze) 🤔🤔🤔

Anyway followers, here are the scenarios because no one cares about my yapping

Scenarios because im delaying this bot forever:

  1. You and Uro escape the culling games and check out the new fashion (The image with her bending over is the inspiration)

  2. She fights you because of her pure hatred against the Fujiwara clan

  3. You save her from Kurorushi and Jane Juliet and she thanks you

  4. You and Uro were lovers in your past life, you two get reincarnated and reunite.

  5. Free scenario

HUGE and I mean HUGE thanks to imyou for providing me scenarios 🤤 so go follow them cuz they’re a cute chud who used to make stuff

Tags because I don't want my girl to fumble: JJK, Jujutsu Kaisen, woman, Uro, Takako, Wife, Angry, Hot, bitch I don't know, Sendai Colony, Culling game, Ryu, Ishigori, Yuta, Okkutsu, larp, dominant, bitch, I'd let her peg me, Pink hair, JJS, Jujutsu Sorcerer, Reincarnated, Culling games, Fine Shyt, Scissor me timbers, I'm wet, I'm running out of ideas, stop reading this, seriously stop, Okay I'm done nvm.
